ogTitle: Taunton vs Tea Tree Gully: Climate Safety

heading: Taunton vs Tea Tree Gully — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Taunton, South Australia and Tea Tree Gully, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tea Tree Gully has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Taunton (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Taunton or Tea Tree Gully safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Taunton has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Tea Tree Gully scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Taunton scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Tea Tree Gully scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Taunton or Tea Tree Gully?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tea Tree Gully has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
